---
title: "marching_cubes"
generated: true
description: "Extract the `level` isosurface of a scalar volume as a triangle mesh."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.isosurface`](../nitrix-geometry-isosurface.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:marching_cubes -->
```python
marching_cubes(volume: NDArray[Any], *, level: float = 0.0, spacing: Tuple[float, float, float] = (1.0, 1.0, 1.0)) -> Mesh
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:marching_cubes -->
Extract the `level` isosurface of a scalar volume as a triangle mesh.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:marching_cubes -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `volume` | `NDArray[Any]` | — | — | Scalar field, shape `(X, Y, Z)`. For a signed-distance field pass the default `level=0` (negative inside). |
| `level` | `float` | — | `0.0` | Isovalue. A grid corner is "inside" when `volume < level`. |
| `spacing` | `Tuple[float, float, float]` | — | `(1.0, 1.0, 1.0)` | Per-axis voxel size; vertex coordinates are in physical units (`index * spacing`). |

**Returns** `Mesh`. A watertight, manifold `Mesh` with outward-oriented faces (normals pointing toward increasing scalar value). Empty (0 vertices, 0 faces) if the level set does not intersect the volume.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sections:marching_cubes -->
::: {.callout-note}
Host-side NumPy construction (data-dependent size); not differentiable.
Marching-tetrahedra engine (see module docstring).
:::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
